title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that evaluates whether AI-generated code is mergeable by assessing pull request quality using blocker criteria, weighted scores, and maintainer-defined rubrics. The benchmark covers 36 flagship open-source repositories and includes Diamond, Main, and Extended subsets across multiple programming languages.
